Describe the sequence of instructions and text overlays shown regarding the tool's attachments and material capabilities throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the text 'Cuts Wood, Metal and Concrete!' appears at the top; at 2s, instructions to hook up a mini vac display beside an inset tool image; at 4s, text reading 'ADD A WATER HOSE FOR CONCRETE' and 'ADD A CO2 HOSE FOR METAL WORK' appears; at 12s, the list 'WOOD • CONCRETE • METAL' appears on wooden planks; at 14s, the question 'ALL IN THE SAME SAW?' fades in below the material list.

What action does the saw perform to demonstrate its function?
canonical_answer: The black track saw slides along a guide rail cutting through the OSB sheet.
